case_title: MEX EXPRESS, INC. VS. NANA BISHOU ENTERPRISES, INC.

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,802.18 FILED BY MEX EXPRESS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT NANA BISHOU ENTERPRISES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-20-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AT THE PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF MEX EXPRESS, INC'S REPRESENTATIVE: JOSE O. MARTINEZ. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEX EXPRESS, INC.
